kategorie.label: Kategorie
kategorie.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

marke_hersteller.label: Marke / Hersteller
marke_hersteller.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

bezugsquelle.label: Bezugsquelle
bezugsquelle.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

notizen_zutat.label: Notizen
notizen_zutat.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

produkt_name.label: Produktname
produkt_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

datum_zubereitung.label: Datum der Zubereitung
datum_zubereitung.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

verwendete_zutaten.label: Verwendete Zutaten
verwendete_zutaten.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Zutaten' with the id `6a27cf2743b0d7439fa14f61` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://ci04.ci.xist4c.de/rest/apps/6a27cf2743b0d7439fa14f61/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

bewertung.label: Bewertung (1–5)
bewertung.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

kommentar.label: Kommentar / Notizen
kommentar.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

variante_name.label: Bezeichnung der Variante
variante_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).
